summary: Comprehensive testing of Marketplace Fork & Derivative Sales feature. All 9 features passed. Backend API tests (14/14) and frontend UI tests all working correctly.

1_marketplace_browse_loads.details: Marketplace page loads with published games, shows 7 games. Game cards display correctly with price badges, game type, and creator info.

2_fork_button_non_owners.details: Fork & Customize button visible on listings for non-owners (data-testid='fork-game-btn'). Button correctly triggers fork flow and redirects to studio.

3_derivative_sales_status_message.details: Games with allow_derivative_sales=true show green 'Derivative sales allowed - you can modify and resell' message. Games with allow_derivative_sales=false show amber 'Personal use only - cannot resell modifications' warning.

4_fork_api_creates_copy.details: POST /api/marketplace/game/{id}/fork creates a copy with is_forked=true, forked_from_id set. Returns can_resell based on original's allow_derivative_sales setting.

5_forked_games_can_resell_status.details: Fork API returns can_resell=true for games allowing derivatives, can_resell=false for games not allowing. Backend correctly enforces this.

6_publish_with_allow_derivative_sales.details: POST /api/marketplace/publish accepts allow_derivative_sales flag. Published games correctly store and display the setting.

7_publish_blocks_unauthorized_forks.details: Attempting to publish a forked game when original doesn't allow derivatives returns 403 with message 'Cannot publish this game. The original creator... does not allow derivative works to be sold on the marketplace.'

8_studio_publish_button.details: Studio Editor has Publish button (data-testid='publish-game-btn') in header that opens PublishDialog.

9_publish_dialog_derivative_toggle.details: PublishDialog shows 'Allow Derivative Sales' toggle (data-testid='derivative-toggle') with description 'Let buyers modify and resell their versions of your game'. For forked games, shows warning about original creator restrictions.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketplace fork & derivative sales feature fully tested. Key data-testids: marketplace-page, game-card-{id}, marketplace-listing-page, fork-game-btn, acquire-game-btn, publish-game-btn, derivative-toggle, category-select, free-toggle. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_marketplace_fork.py cover all API scenarios including auth, ownership, and derivative permissions.
